token.title: Deepal — Enter tokens
token.description: Paste your access token and refresh token from a proxy capture of the Deepal app login.

data.device_id: Device ID (optional — leave blank to auto-generate, or paste your phone's device ID to share its session)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Deepal API or no vehicles found. Check your tokens.

paste_tokens.title: Paste new tokens
paste_tokens.description: Your Deepal session is no longer valid. This can happen if you logged in on another device, or your tokens expired. Capture a fresh login from the Deepal app using a proxy tool and paste the tokens below.
